reviews.review_description: It's messenger, message and call as you'd expect. Not sure video call is an option. If Meta is trying to push VR, this is one of the apps they really need to work on. This would be the perfect spot to allow your avatar to be your face during video call, maybe even allow a person to take them along in some virtual world, or even just their room. Then non VR users can see and experience VR vicariously, and think "oh, that was kinda cool, I kinda want VR." Speaking of which, I'm still annoyed Meta evicted us from our rooms/environment.

Was great when screen sharing was available but now it's useless. Can't see the caller and can't share your screen. Very disappointed this was removed. Would also be great if they included predictive text like the phone version to speed up conversations. Typing using the controllers is slow and cumbersome. Voice call still works at least but there is so much lacking in the VR version now that video call and screen sharing is gone
